title: Module
description: A course module or capstone in the IWFM Level 4 FM Academy, mapped to its learner journey and content files.

number.description: Module number. 0 is course orientation; 13 is the Longleat boardroom simulation.

learner_journey.description: Learner journey classification from the app integration plan.

content_path.description: Repo-relative path to the module markdown file.

workbook_path.description: Repo-relative path to the matching workbook file, if any.

learning_outcomes.description: Learning outcomes listed at the top of the module.

lesson_count.description: Number of phone lessons in the module.

compliance_bible_links.description: Named Compliance Bible sections referenced by the module.
